Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
{FirepowerIcon}: Heal equal to [blue]{Heal:diff()}%[/blue] of damage dealt.
SQUALL-DRAIN_SLASH.title: Drain Slash
SQUALL-FUSILLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SQUALL-FUSILLADE.title: Fusillade
SQUALL-SAVAGE_CLAW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Costs 1 less {Energy:energyIcons()} for each Attack played this turn.
SQUALL-SAVAGE_CLAW.title: Savage Claw
SQUALL-DEVASTATING_SLUG.title: Devastating Slug
SQUALL-DEFENSIVE_MANEUVER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
{FirepowerIcon}: Consume [gold]Firepower[/gold], gain [blue]Block[/blue] an additional time.
SQUALL-DEFENSIVE_MANEUVER.title: Defensive Maneuver
SQUALL-UPPER_BLUES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
{FirepowerIcon}: Gain [blue]Block[/blue] equal to damage dealt.
SQUALL-UPPER_BLUES.title: Upper Blues
SQUALL-ICE_ARMOR.title: Ice Armor
SQUALL-COMBAT_FOCUS.title: Combat Focus
SQUALL-RICOCHET.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
If the target is [gold]Marked[/gold], damage ALL other enemies equal to the damage dealt.
SQUALL-RICOCHET.title: Ricochet
SQUALL-SHIVA.description:
[gold]Junction[/gold]: Gain 3 [blue]Block[/blue] on [gold]Firepower[/gold] consumption. 
[gold]Summon[/gold]: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Gain {Block:diff()} [blue]Block[/blue].
SQUALL-SHIVA.title: Junction Shiva
SQUALL-QUEZACOATL.description:
[gold]Junction[/gold]: Draw 1 card on [gold]Firepower[/gold] consumption. 
[gold]Summon[/gold]: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times to random enemies.
SQUALL-QUEZACOATL.title: Junction Quezacoatl
SQUALL-LEVIATHAN.description:
[gold]Junction[/gold]: Heal 2 [gold]HP[/gold] on [gold]Firepower[/gold] consumption. 
[gold]Summon[/gold]: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold].
SQUALL-LEVIATHAN.title: Junction Leviathan
SQUALL-DIABOLOS.description:
[gold]Junction[/gold]: Gain 3 [gold]Crisis[/gold] on [gold]Firepower[/gold] consumption. 
[gold]Summon[/gold]: ALL enemies lose {Damage:diff()} HP and {HpPercent:diff()}% of their current HP.
SQUALL-DIABOLOS.title: Junction Diabolos
SQUALL-IFRIT.description:
[gold]Junction[/gold]: [gold]Firepower[/gold] gain 2 additional damage. 
[gold]Summon[/gold]: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
SQUALL-IFRIT.title: Junction Ifrit
SQUALL-SUMMON_GF.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
Summon your [gold]Junctioned[/gold] GF in {ChannelingGfPower} turns.
SQUALL-SUMMON_GF.title: Summon GF
SQUALL-PERFECT_JUNCTION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
Summon your [gold]Junctioned[/gold] GF next turn.
SQUALL-PERFECT_JUNCTION.title: Perfect Junction
